channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Religious Scholars Commend Geo News' Unconditional Apology for Muharram Documentary
item.description: Prominent Islamic scholars have publicly endorsed Geo News for its unconditional apology and corrective measures following the airing of a documentary that included symbolic depictions of the Holy Pro...

item.title: Metropolitan Police probe £500,000 in donations to Reform UK linked to convicted fraudster's mother
item.description: The Metropolitan Police are investigating at least £500,000 in donations made to Reform UK by Fiona Cottrell, the mother of a convicted fraudster. The inquiry, which began in February 2025, focuses on...

item.title: Tanzanian Photographer Wins Global Award for Documenting Herbal Medicine Traditions
item.description: Filbert Minja, a Tanzanian photographer, has been recognized internationally after winning the David Wolf Kaye Future Potential Award – Photography at Earth Photo 2026 in London. His project, Roots of...

item.title: Philippines Reaffirms Sovereignty Over Batanes Amid Disputed Claims
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) and the National Security Council (NSC) have firmly rejected claims that Batanes, the northernmost province of the Philippines, belongs to China. AFP spokespe...

item.title: Key considerations for choosing durable outdoor rugs
item.description: The article highlights common errors to avoid when selecting outdoor rugs, emphasizing material selection, size, functionality, and safety. Experts warn against prioritizing aesthetics over durability...

item.title: Man Sentenced to Two Years for Smuggling Four Indonesian Nationals
item.description: A man has been sentenced to two years in prison for illegally transporting four Indonesian migrants across international borders. The case, which originated from a joint operation between Malaysian an...

item.title: One Skillet Honey Soy Glazed Salmon Recipe
item.description: This article presents a simple and flavorful recipe for honey soy glazed salmon, perfect for busy weeknights. The dish features a one-pan cooking method, reducing cleanup while delivering a delicious ...

item.title: El-Rufai Aide Rebuts ICPC Claims Over Hospital Visit Allegations
item.description: The aide to former Kaduna State governor Nasir El-Rufai, Muyiwa Adekeye, has denied claims by the Independent Corrupt Practices Commission (ICPC) that El-Rufai's hospital visit turned into a political...

item.title: Panic Attacks and Recovery: Understanding and Managing Panic Disorder
item.description: Panic attacks, though brief, can have long-lasting impacts on daily life, leading to avoidance behaviors and significant distress. The article highlights that up to 23% of South Africans may experienc...

item.title: Legal Basis for 16-Vote Threshold in Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte began on July 6, 2026, with Senate President Chiz Escudero setting the conviction threshold at 16 votes. This decision was based on a Supreme Court...

item.title: Sarah Henderson's Triple Zero Call and the Unproud History of Political Own Goals
item.description: The article discusses how Sarah Henderson, the Coalition's opposition communications spokeswoman, attempted to humiliate the government by calling triple zero to test its functionality during a Telstr...

item.title: Speculation Mounts Over Meghan and Children Joining Prince Harry in UK Amid Security Concerns
item.description: Prince Harry's family, including Meghan Markle and their children Archie and Lilibet, are speculated to join him in the UK this week for private events, marking a potential reunion with King Charles I...

item.title: High Court Petition Challenges Nairobi Water Tariff Increase Over Alleged Lack of Proper Public Participation
item.description: A Nairobi resident, Francis Awino, has filed a constitutional petition at the High Court seeking to stop the implementation of recently revised water tariffs introduced through Gazette Notice No. 2710...

item.title: Bafana coach Hugo Broos announces exit after World Cup, hints at advisory role with Safa
item.description: Hugo Broos, the coach of the South African national football team Bafana Bafana, has confirmed his departure from the role following the 2026 FIFA World Cup. After a period of uncertainty following So...

item.title: Eniola Badmus Shares Journey of Weight Loss and Overcoming Criticism
item.description: Nollywood actress Eniola Badmus has opened up about the ongoing criticism she faces despite her significant weight loss journey. In a heartfelt post on her Instagram page, she shared her transformatio...

item.title: Celebrating 30 Years of Bongo Flava: Tanzania’s Musical Identity and Cultural Evolution
item.description: Bongo Flava, a Tanzanian music genre blending hip-hop, traditional sounds, and Kiswahili storytelling, has become a cultural mirror reflecting the nation's social realities and youth aspirations. Over...

item.title: Accused in Charlie Kirk's murder: Dremel tool, texts, and a long drive to work
item.description: Tyler Robinson, 23, faces murder charges in the 2025 killing of Charlie Kirk, founder of Turning Point USA, during a campus event. Prosecutors allege Robinson used a Dremel tool to engrave bullets wit...

item.title: KP Governor Advocates Unified Legislative Privileges Framework Across Pakistan
item.description: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Governor Faisal Karim Kundi has called for a unified legislative framework to standardize privileges, salaries, and entitlements for lawmakers across Pakistan. His push comes after ...

item.title: Key Developments Across Africa: Legal Disputes, Conflicts and Health Crises
item.description: The article compiles critical updates from across Africa. In Uganda, the judiciary has clashed with the Law Society over colonial courtroom traditions, rejecting calls to replace formal titles like 'M...

item.title: Kenyan Fan Overwhelmed After Meeting Eliud Kipchoge in Brazil
item.description: A devoted fan of Kenyan marathon legend Eliud Kipchoge was emotionally moved after unexpectedly meeting the athlete during his visit to Brazil. The encounter, which took place ahead of the NB42K Porto...
